name: Ideal Power Inc.
summary: PART I ITEM 1: BUSINESS Our Company Ideal Power Inc. was formed in Texas on May17, 2007 and converted to a Delaware corporation on July15, 2013. Unless otherwise stated or the context otherwise requires, the terms Ideal Power, we, us, our and the Company refer to Ideal Power Inc. We are solely focused on the further development and commercialization of our Bidirectional bipolar junction TRANsistor (B-TRAN) solid-state switch technology.
